description: Add a documentation source URL for crawling and indexing. Optionally specify scope controls: allow/block URL patterns (glob), max depth, max pages.

allowPatterns.description: Comma-separated glob patterns for allowed URL paths (e.g., '/docs/**,/api/**'). Empty = allow all.

blockPatterns.description: Comma-separated glob patterns for blocked URL paths (e.g., '/archive/**,/old/**'). Empty = block none.

llmsTxtUrl.description: Manual llms.txt URL if auto-detection fails.

maxDepth.description: Maximum crawl depth from root URL. Null = unlimited.

maxPages.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl (default: 500).

url.description: URL of the documentation site to index

name: add_source

description: Check the crawl status and index statistics for a documentation source by ID.

sourceId.description: UUID of the source to check

name: crawl_status

description: View global index statistics: total chunks, sources, storage size, embedding dimensions, and last activity timestamp.
name: index_statistics

description: List all indexed documentation sources with status, last crawl time, and chunk count.
name: list_sources

description: Trigger a recrawl of an existing documentation source. Incremental by default (only re-processes changed pages). Use full=true to force complete re-processing.

allowPatterns.description: Override allow patterns for this crawl run (comma-separated globs)

blockPatterns.description: Override block patterns for this crawl run (comma-separated globs)

full.description: Force full recrawl (re-process all pages, not just changed ones)

maxDepth.description: Override max depth for this crawl run

maxPages.description: Override max pages for this crawl run

name.description: Update the display name for this source

sourceId.description: UUID of the source to re-crawl

version.description: Update the version label for this source

name: recrawl_source

description: Remove a documentation source and its indexed data by source ID.

sourceId.description: UUID of the source to remove

name: remove_source

description: Search indexed documentation by semantic query. Returns relevant excerpts with source URLs, section paths, and reranking scores for citation. Supports metadata filters for narrowing results.

contentType.description: Filter by content type: PROSE, CODE, or MIXED (all)

minScore.description: Minimum reranking confidence score (0.0-1.0). Results below this threshold are excluded.

sectionPath.description: Filter by section path prefix, e.g. 'API Reference'

name: search_docs
